testcase.name: createPaymentReturnsCreatedPayment
testcase.system-out:
13:09:12.389 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.foodordering.paymentservice.controller.PaymentControllerIntegrationTest]: PaymentControllerIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:09:12.542 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.foodordering.paymentservice.PaymentServiceApplication for test class com.foodordering.paymentservice.controller.PaymentControllerIntegrationTest 13:09:12.595 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/sagee/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.8/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: getPaymentByIdReturnsPayment
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-28T13:09:14.351+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.foodordering.paymentservice.controller.PaymentController#getPaymentById(Long) 2026-03-28T13:09:14.353+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json, application/yaml] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.353+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [PaymentResponse[id=1, orderId=1, amount=2500.0, paymentMethod=CARD, paymentStatus=PAID]]

testcase.name: createPaymentReturnsValidationErrorsForInvalidPayload

testcase.name: getAllPaymentsReturnsPayments

testcase.name: createPaymentReturnsBadRequestWhenAmountDoesNotMatchOrder
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-28T13:09:14.410+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.foodordering.paymentservice.controller.PaymentController#createPayment(PaymentRequest) 2026-03-28T13:09:14.411+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Read "application/json;charset=UTF-8" to [com.foodordering.paymentservice.dto.PaymentRequest@37cf91d8] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.412+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Using @ExceptionHandler com.foodordering.paymentservice.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler#handleIllegalArgumentException(IllegalArgumentException, HttpServletRequest) 2026-03-28T13:09:14.413+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json, application/yaml] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.413+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [ApiErrorResponse[timestamp=2026-03-28T13:09:14.413156, status=400, error=Bad Request, message=Paymen (truncated)...] 2026-03-28T13:09:14.413+05:30 DEBUG 44424 --- [payment-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Payment amount must match order total amount 2200.0]
